findings.description: Monitoring section describes only metrics exposure. A production-ready architecture brief should also describe alerting thresholds, on-call escalation paths, and SLAs.
findings.evidence: "The pipeline exposes a metrics endpoint at /metrics with standard Prometheus counters for throughput, error rate, and queue depth." No alerting rules, thresholds, SLAs, or runbook references.
findings.suggestion: Add alerting rules or runbook reference; add SLA targets for throughput and error rate.

findings.description: No mention of data retention policy, PII handling, or compliance framework for a pipeline handling customer analytics events.
findings.evidence: No mention of data retention, PII, or compliance anywhere in the document.
findings.suggestion: Add a Data Governance or Compliance subsection, or explicitly state that governance is out of scope.
